value: I sincerely apologize for the frustration—waiting two months for a reset is unacceptable, and missing the promised call today makes this worse. I want to get this resolved for you right away. Can you confirm the email address or phone number associated with your Apple ID so I can escalate this immediately and ensure you get a callback within the next few hours? In the meantime, if you'd prefer, I can walk you through a reset option now rather than waiting further.
